creator: pp3k@yandex.ru
text:
I have a problem with upgrading samba 4.10.15 to 4.10.17 with portmaster.

This is the options that I've set:

OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=GSSAPI_BUILTIN
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=ZEROCONF_NONE

Last part of the build log:
